blockingIssues.description: `/users/profile` with empty username still renders an error state instead of redirecting as required by VAL-USER-051.
Public profile behavior still does not satisfy VAL-USER-052 (extra profile fields/date formatting path remains unimplemented in API/UI).
Failed-login throttling still responds immediately with 429 metadata instead of enforcing observed timing delays (~1s/~2s/~5s) required by VAL-USER-071/072/073.
Throttle tests assert `retryAfterSeconds` values only and still do not verify elapsed response timing, leaving contract behavior unverified.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update account/profile route guidance to match current client routing aliases (`/users/account`, `/users/profile`) so implementation references do not drift.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Current architecture guidance warns against `/users/*` links while app routes now include these aliases (`app/apps/client/src/App.tsx`).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify how strict TDD/manual-browser steps should be enforced and evaluated for refinement/fix tasks, including handoff scoring expectations.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review observed mismatch between required skill procedure steps and accepted worker behavior in the fix session transcript/handoff.
